title: Glenwood House School receives Green Award
description: GEORGE NEWS - It was a profound honour for...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - It was a profound honour for Glenwood House to be recognised with the esteemed Green Award.


> This award celebrates outstanding achievements in advancing the well-being of the community, promoting animal welfare, and contributing meaningfully to environmental conservation.


The award was presented by Monica Vaccaro, a representative of the Landmark Foundation, alongside Councillor Erika Brown, who together highlighted Glenwood House's dedicated efforts in fostering a healthier, more sustainable world for both people and wildlife.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
